name: dashboard-01
description: A full application dashboard built around the sidebar — a navigation sidebar, a top bar, KPI cards, an overview chart, and a recent-activity list.

name: dashboard-02
description: A dashboard application shell built around the sidebar — a branded header with search, a collapsible nav item with a sub-menu, a project list with row actions, a user footer, and a bottom tab bar overridden by the sidebar drawer.

name: login-01
description: A sign-in screen: an (auth) route group with a login form card.

name: login-02
description: A sign-in screen with social providers and a divider, as an (auth) route.

name: signup-01
description: A sign-up screen: an (auth) route with a registration form and terms checkbox.

name: stats-01
description: A dashboard route with a stack of KPI stat cards and trend badges.
